sources.note: Searched hybrid+electric under $10k within 100 mi, price asc. 34+ results read across 2 pages (page 1 = cheapest 24, all <=71 mi; page 2 mixed local + out-of-radius shippable). No Cloudflare block this run - detail data read live. Richest source; 15 of the shortlist came from here.

Loaded the 80015 price-asc list, but the hybrid/electric fuel filter is still not URL-addressable and the deal-rated hybrids overlap Cars.com. No unique in-radius listing beat the Cars.com/private picks this run, so 0 made the shortlist.

Searched hybrid, prius and leaf (price asc). Reconfirmed live: 2015 C-Max Energi (Aurora), 2008 Prius $4,299 (Denver, cross-listed OfferUp), 2014 Prius Two (N Denver), 2013 Leaf SL 9/12-bar (Brighton). New: 2009 Prius $3,900/194k (Denver). Lots of dealer duplicate spam filtered out.

Logged in; searched prius and nissan leaf (price asc, scrolled several screens). Prius: dozens of older $3-4k cars, all high-mileage (e.g. a 2016 Prius c at $4,250 had 205k mi) - none beat existing picks. Leaf query reconfirmed the 2017 Leaf S $5,999 (Denver) and surfaced a NEW 2017 Leaf SV $6,000 (Boulder). Photos are signed/ephemeral so left null; FB tiles don't show mileage.
The $0-10k URL filter is ignored; the price slider bottoms out at $9,000 and Carvana adds shipping/fees to 80015. Nothing at/under $10k clearly beat the local picks.
Not re-searched this run. Prior runs: BIN results are nationwide with unverified distance from 80015 and none beat the local deals within 100 mi.
Not re-searched this run. Prior runs: fleet is late-model (2020+); no sub-$10k hybrids/EVs in their inventory near 80015.
Search URL returns a 404 page again this run, and the site's own price tiers start at 'Under $20k' - no sub-$10k hybrids/EVs in their fleet inventory.

Searched prius (mileage shown on tiles). Reconfirmed live: 2016 Prius c $7,500/100k (Aurora), 2014 Prius v $8,998/189k (Centennial), 2008 Prius $4,299/121k (Denver, cross-listed Craigslist). New: 2010 Prius $5,800/135k (Commerce City).
Utah-only; well beyond the 100-mi radius of 80015. Not stretching the radius this run.

listings.carSeatNotes: Compact hatchback rear seat - rear-facing fits but the battery raises the load floor; check clearance behind the front passenger.
listings.nextAction: Dealer (Victory Motors) - request the free Carfax and a battery capacity check; confirm real-world winter range before the 43 mi trip.
listings.why: Lowest-mileage car on the whole list (40k) at only $5,999, still a Cars.com 'Great Deal' + High Demand (also on CarGurus/Craigslist via the same dealer). ~76 mi range easily covers the ~25 mi commute on the home L1 outlet. 43 mi away is the only knock.

listings.carSeatNotes: Midsize sedan with a roomy rear bench and easy LATCH access - rear-facing seat fits comfortably.
listings.nextAction: Dealer (Urban Motors Red) - request the free Carfax and proof the model-year recalls were performed.
listings.why: Lowest-mileage sedan on the list (101k), roomy safe family car, ~39 mpg, only 18 mi away, still a Cars.com 'Great Deal'. Best all-round pick for a young child.

listings.title: Clean
listings.carSeatNotes: Compact hatchback rear seat - rear-facing fits but the battery raises the load floor; check clearance behind the front passenger.
listings.nextAction: Dealer (Auto Warehouse) - request the free Carfax; battery Range Score is 'Excellent', but confirm real-world winter range before the 71 mi trip.
listings.why: Lowest miles on the entire list (33.7k), clean title, no accidents, 5-star. Cars.com 'Good Deal'. ~76 mi range fits the short L1 commute; 71 mi away is the only knock.

listings.carSeatNotes: Roomy midsize sedan rear seat with easy LATCH - rear-facing fits comfortably; large trunk for daycare bags.
listings.nextAction: Dealer (Car Corner) - request Carfax and service history; at 196k miles verify the hybrid battery has no fault codes.
listings.why: 5-star NHTSA, bulletproof Camry Hybrid drivetrain, 40 mpg, only 12 mi away, Cars.com 'Great Deal' (holding at $6,798 after last week's price drop). Higher miles (196k) is the trade-off.

listings.carSeatNotes: 1st-gen Volt has a firm center console and only two rear seats - check rear-facing clearance behind the front passenger.
listings.nextAction: Dealer (Frontline, 4.9 rating) - request Carfax and the recall receipt; ask about traction-battery health.
listings.why: ~35 mi electric daily commute on the home Level-1 outlet, gas backup for trips. 5-star NHTSA, only 1 recall. Still $5,995 after a -$500 drop - cheapest plug-in with full data.

listings.carSeatNotes: Roomy hybrid crossover - tall, upright rear seat and wide doors make no-bend rear-facing installs easy, with a big hatch for stroller and daycare bags.
listings.nextAction: Dealer (O'Meara VW) - request Carfax; verify the two open PRA fire recalls (18V666/22V836) and the 23V534 clutch-actuator recall were completed.
listings.why: Newest hybrid here and one of the roomiest - the Niro is a proven, efficient (50 mpg) family crossover, only 22 mi away, Cars.com 'Good Deal' + High Demand. No NHTSA star rating (IIHS rated it a Top Safety Pick). Priciest pick and 123k miles, so verify recall completion and battery health.

listings.carSeatNotes: Roomy 2nd-gen Prius hatchback rear seat fits a rear-facing seat; tall roofline eases loading a child, big hatch for gear.
listings.nextAction: Private seller - ask for VIN + title photo and confirm the ~121k mileage; also on OfferUp at the same price (121k confirmed there). Verify hybrid battery health on an 18-yr-old car.
listings.why: Cheapest reliable car on the list ($4,299) with only ~121k miles - low for a 2nd-gen Prius (these routinely pass 250k). 46 mpg, only 12 mi away. Cross-listed on OfferUp (mileage confirmed 121k). Reconfirmed live this run. Private sale - inspect carefully.

listings.carSeatNotes: Roomy hatchback rear seat fits a rear-facing seat; tall roofline makes lowering a child in easy, big hatch for gear.
listings.nextAction: Dealer - request Carfax; verify the model-year recalls (incl. steering shaft and water-pump campaigns) were completed.
listings.why: Bulletproof reliability (200k+ routine), 50 mpg, roomy hatch, only 12 mi away, Cars.com 'Great Deal'. High miles but very cheap to run.

listings.carSeatNotes: Hatchback with a flat, roomy rear bench - rear-facing installs easily; wide door opening for loading a child.
listings.nextAction: Seller lists 9/12 battery bars - ask for a LeafSpy report and photo of the capacity gauge; confirm title before the Brighton drive.
listings.why: Lowest miles of any EV here (68k) and the seller openly discloses 9/12 battery bars (~75%). Pre-2017 range is limited but still covers the short commute; winter buffer is tight. Reconfirmed live this run.

listings.carSeatNotes: Midsize sedan with a roomy rear bench and easy LATCH access - rear-facing seat fits comfortably.
listings.nextAction: Private seller (PJ) - ask for a title photo and maintenance records; verify hybrid battery health given the price and 155k miles.
listings.why: Cheapest Fusion Hybrid ($5,200) and just 7 mi away - the closest car on the list. Roomy, safe family sedan at ~39 mpg. Private sale - inspect carefully.

listings.title: Clean
listings.carSeatNotes: Roomy midsize luxury sedan - wide rear doors and easy LATCH make a rear-facing install comfortable.
listings.nextAction: Dealer (Larry H. Miller) - request the free Carfax; same 45-mpg hybrid drivetrain as a Fusion Hybrid, so verify hybrid-battery health.
listings.why: Clean-title, no-accident luxury hybrid with the proven Fusion Hybrid drivetrain (~45 mpg), 5-star, only 22 mi away. Roomy and well-equipped for a family at a fair price.

listings.carSeatNotes: Tall wagon body with wide-opening doors - very easy to load a rear-facing seat and daycare bags in the hatch.
listings.nextAction: Ask this private seller for the VIN + title photo and confirm the ~162k mileage before driving out.
listings.why: Cheapest plug-in and right here in Aurora (5 mi) - reconfirmed live again this run. ~19 mi electric covers much of the daily commute on the Level-1 outlet, then 38 mpg hybrid. High miles (162k) - inspect closely.

listings.carSeatNotes: Hatchback with a flat, roomy rear bench - rear-facing seat installs easily; good door opening for a child.
listings.nextAction: Ask the dealer (Auto Warehouse) for a battery state-of-health / capacity-bar readout and the Carfax before the drive to Fort Collins.
listings.why: 30 kWh 2017+ Leaf, low miles for the year (100k). Range Score 'Good'. Easily covers the ~25 mi commute on Level 1. Winter range drops ~25-30% - confirm battery bars. 71 mi away.

listings.carSeatNotes: Roomy hybrid SUV - tall, upright rear seat and wide doors make no-bend rear-facing installs easy, with lots of cargo for kid gear.
listings.nextAction: Dealer (Layal) - request Carfax; on a 174k-mile Lexus hybrid, ask about traction-battery health and any inverter service.
listings.why: Reliable Lexus hybrid SUV just 6 mi away in Aurora, 0 open recalls, roomy cargo. Lower MPG (30) and high miles are the trade-offs.

listings.carSeatNotes: Subcompact - rear-facing fits but you may need to slide the front passenger seat forward; verify clearance with the seat installed.
listings.nextAction: Private seller in Aurora - ask for VIN + title photo and confirm the ~100k mileage; easy local test-drive. Reconfirmed live this run.
listings.why: Local to Aurora (5 mi). Newer, very reliable, 46 mpg, low-ish miles (100k), 0 open recalls. Small back seat is the only caveat for a rear-facing seat.

listings.carSeatNotes: Golf hatchback with a solid, upright rear bench - rear-facing installs easily and doors open wide for a child.
listings.nextAction: Dealer (Victory Motors) - request Carfax and a battery capacity check; ~83 mi rated range, so confirm winter range for the commute.
listings.why: Well-built EV hatchback, Cars.com 'Good Deal', Range Score 'Good', 94k miles. ~83 mi range comfortably covers the short L1 commute. 43 mi away and a smaller charging network than the Leaf.

listings.carSeatNotes: Hatchback with a flat, roomy rear bench - rear-facing seat installs easily; good door opening for a child.
listings.nextAction: Ask the dealer for a battery capacity-bar readout; Range Score is 'Fair', so confirm real usable range.
listings.why: Cheap 24 kWh EV, 4-star. Pre-2017 pack means limited winter range - fine for the short L1 commute but tight buffer. 71 mi away.

listings.carSeatNotes: Roomy midsize sedan rear seat with easy LATCH - comfortable rear-facing fit; large trunk for daycare bags.
listings.nextAction: Dealer (Corwin Toyota Boulder) - request Carfax and hybrid-battery service history on a 171k-mile car; confirm no dealer fees.
listings.why: Cars.com 'Good Deal' + High Demand on a proven Camry Hybrid at $6,699, roomy family sedan. Older (2007) and higher miles, and Boulder is 37 mi away.

listings.carSeatNotes: Compact hybrid SUV - upright rear seat and wide doors make rear-facing installs easy, with a tall hatch for stroller and daycare bags.
listings.nextAction: Dealer (Burgio Motors) - request Carfax and confirm hybrid-battery health on a 189k-mile car; ask about any dealer fees.
listings.why: NEW. Cheap ($4,400) hybrid SUV with family-friendly space and 0 open recalls, High Demand on Cars.com. ~32 mpg is lower than the sedans and 189k miles is high, but it is one of the cheapest SUVs on the list. 41 mi away.

listings.carSeatNotes: Roomy 2nd-gen Prius hatchback rear seat fits a rear-facing seat; tall roofline eases loading a child, big hatch for gear.
listings.nextAction: Private seller - ask for VIN + title photo and confirm the ~194k mileage; verify hybrid-battery health before driving out.
listings.why: NEW. Second-cheapest car on the list ($3,900) - a bulletproof 2nd-gen Prius at 46 mpg, only 12 mi away. 194k miles is high (but routine for a Prius). Private sale - inspect the traction battery carefully.

listings.carSeatNotes: Roomy hatchback rear seat fits a rear-facing seat; tall roofline makes lowering a child in easy, big hatch for gear.
listings.nextAction: Private seller in Commerce City - ask for VIN + title photo and service records; verify hybrid-battery health at 135k miles.
listings.why: NEW. A 2010 Prius with only 135k miles (low for the model) at $5,800, 50 mpg, 15 mi away. Lower-mileage and cheaper than the dealer 2010 Prius above. Private sale - inspect carefully.

listings.carSeatNotes: Hatchback with a flat, roomy rear bench - rear-facing seat installs easily; good door opening for a child.
listings.nextAction: Ask the private seller for the mileage and a photo of the dashboard battery-capacity bars (or a LeafSpy report) before the drive to Boulder.
listings.why: NEW. A 2017+ 30 kWh Leaf SV at $6,000 - the better-equipped SV trim for the same price as the base 2014s here. Easily covers the short L1 commute; confirm battery bars for winter buffer. Mileage not listed - ask the seller.

listings.carSeatNotes: Hatchback with a flat, roomy rear bench - rear-facing seat installs easily; good door opening for a child.
listings.nextAction: Ask the private seller for a photo of the dashboard battery-capacity bars (or a LeafSpy report) and mileage before viewing.
listings.why: Cheap, close-by (14 mi) 2017+ EV - easily covers the short commute on Level 1. Winter range drops ~25-30%, so confirm battery bars. Reconfirmed live via a Facebook leaf query this run.

listings.carSeatNotes: Roomy Prius liftback rear seat; easy rear-facing fit and a big hatch for stroller + daycare bags.
listings.nextAction: Private party - verify clean title and get maintenance records; confirm the recent-inspection claim.
listings.why: Newer-gen Prius, top MPG of the group (50), seller notes a recent inspection, only 12 mi away. Reconfirmed live this run.

listings.carSeatNotes: Prius v is the wagon - the roomiest Prius rear seat and a huge hatch; easiest Prius here for a rear-facing seat plus stroller and daycare bags.
listings.nextAction: Private seller in Centennial - ask for VIN and a title photo; the listing shows 189k miles, so verify service history for that mileage.
listings.why: The wagon Prius v gives real family space (big hatch) while keeping ~42 mpg and Toyota reliability, only 6 mi away. Reconfirmed live this run at 189k miles - higher than ideal, so price accordingly.
